## Summary

A clear, concise description of the problem.

## Reproduction

Minimal, runnable example (<= 30 lines if possible):

```python

```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happens. Paste the full traceback if there is one, in a
code block.

```
traceback / output
```

## Environment

- FUSE version: (output of `python -c "import fusepoint; print(fusepoint.__version__)"`)
- Python version:
- Operating system:
- Mode (statistical layer only / `deep=True` theorem-anchored layer):
- Input form (DataFrame / array / CSV / JSON / scan):
